subject: [PATCH 1/1] [RFC] sunrpc: inject process namespace into machinename field

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: Raised concern about fetching user namespace ID in async ops and provided a link to Sashiko's comments on the patch.

reviews.author: Tigran Mkrtchyan
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the concern and mentioned that Chuck suggested using COMPOUND tag, which sounds more reasonable.

2026-06-26.patch_summary: Patch proposes injecting process namespace into machinename field for sunrpc, but reviewer raises concerns about async ops and suggests using COMPOUND tag instead.
